rationale: Educ. Code §13.204 governs the procedural mechanism for abolishing an educational district via election and annexation to contiguous districts. It contains no reference to property tax exemptions, homestead valuations, or Tax Code §11.13(b). The proposed homestead exemption increase operates in an entirely separate statutory domain and does not affect district abolition procedures.
quote: Sec. 13.204. ORDER ABOLISHING DISTRICT. (a) The commissioners court of each county shall canvass the returns of the election in its county.
_note: No conflict identified; rule_text pertains to district abolition elections, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
